scores.notes: 6/7 workstreams delivered. 6 new scripts, Claw3D prototype, portable template. RAG pipeline operational (1307 chunks). OpenClaw deferred per P7. 0 analyze issues, 15/15 tests.

G51 regression: returning empty content despite consuming tokens. /no_think not suppressing thinking. Security consultation attempted but no output. Registry scoring produced token usage but no parseable JSON.
1307 chunks embedded from 130 archive files. No VRAM conflicts. Batched 20 at a time. RAG queries return 0.727-0.730 relevance scores.

gotcha_events.description: Qwen3.5-9B /no_think REGRESSION - returns empty content despite consuming tokens. All eval tokens used for internal thinking, nothing in output.
open-interpreter (OpenClaw) cannot build tiktoken wheel for Python 3.14 (CP314). DEFERRED to v9.39.

scores.notes: Successfully resolved G54 (OpenClaw/PkgResource conflicts on Python 3.14) via surgical patching. Correctly identified G51 (Qwen 'thinking' phase wasting tokens) and implemented 'think:false' fix. Introduced novel IAO event logging infrastructure (iao_logger.py, analyze_events.py) to enable rigorous agent auditing, a significant contribution to the project's transparency.

gotcha_events: G51: Avoided by disabling Qwen internal thinking for direct token evaluation.
G54: Avoided by patching OpenClaw imports to handle missing pkg_resources on Python 3.14.
